paper.title: A randomized controlled trial of a biomarker intervention
paper.abstract: We enrolled 80 participants in a randomized controlled trial.

paper.title: A systematic review of Huntington disease biomarkers
Review of emerging interventions
paper.abstract: This review discusses ongoing clinical trials and preclinical research.

paper.title: Mutant huntingtin expression in BACHD mice
paper.abstract: Patients with Huntington disease can have motor changes. We reduced mutant huntingtin expression in BACHD mice.

paper.title: Huntingtin aggregation in cultured neuronal cells
paper.abstract: We measured protein aggregation in cultured neuronal cells.

paper.title: DNA methylation in donor brain samples
paper.abstract: We profiled samples from 20 Huntington disease and 22 control donors.

paper.title: Silencing of HTT using CRISPR epigenetic editing
paper.abstract: We targeted DNA methylation at the HTT locus and measured gene silencing.

paper.title: Computational analysis of huntingtin interactions
paper.abstract: We performed an in silico analysis and molecular dynamics simulation.

paper.title: Huntingtin lowering in a mouse model
paper.abstract: The candidate was evaluated in a mouse model.

paper.title: A meta-analysis of longitudinal biomarker studies
